title: Yijing Hexagram 1: Qian (The Creative)
description: Hexagram 1 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 1 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Creative works sublime success, furthering through perseverance. The dragon hidden in the deep. The dragon flying in the heavens. Heaven moves with strength.
